description_long: This hammer features a robust, cylindrical double-sided head with metallic silver coloring and gold accent bands, giving it a striking and ornamental appearance. The head is thick and symmetrical, with both ends identical, suggesting it is designed for heavy-duty striking rather than precision work. The handle is straight, metallic, and reinforced with gold bands and a flared base, providing both strength and a secure grip. The overall design is reminiscent of a ceremonial or sledgehammer, with a focus on durability and impact force. The surface finish is smooth with a slight sheen, and there are no visible signs of wear or branding. This hammer would stand out in an urban environment, possibly as a specialty or display tool.
description: A large, double-sided silver and gold hammer with a cylindrical head and a reinforced straight handle, featuring smooth surfaces and ornamental accents.
description_view_0: Front view shows the symmetrical double-sided cylindrical head with gold bands and the straight handle centered below.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the thick, rounded profile of the hammer head and the straight alignment of the handle.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, displaying the same cylindrical head and handle structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view again highlights the rounded, thick head and straight handle, identical to view 1.
attribute_handle_type: Straight metallic handle with gold reinforcement bands and a flared base, smooth surface, no visible ergonomic grip enhancements.
attribute_head_type: Double-sided cylindrical sledge-type head, both ends flat and identical, with gold accent bands.
